title: erigeron consanguineus
intro: Erigeron consanguineus, also known as hummingbird flower or sweet scabiosa, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron consanguineus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and aiding in the treatment of sore throats. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
